codeReview.summary: Pass. The fix commit directly resolves all three blocking findings from import-fidelity and updates tests to enforce the corrected behavior: Load Backup BackLink now reads 'Back to Welcome', load/decrypt validator strings now use the canonical '(2/3) · Share #1' format (with decrypt Created-date suffix), and corrupted-error now renders a single primary 'Back to Import' CTA while amber keeps primary+ghost pairing.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission feature text for the original import-fidelity feature still conflicts with the validation contract for the corrupted-error CTA, which can mislead future implementations/reviews.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json:916 says import-error-corrupted uses a Retry CTA, while validation-contract.md:293 requires a single primary 'Back to Import' CTA (and the fix feature itself encodes this at features.json:959).

summary: Reviewed fix-import-copy-and-error-cta against the prior failing review and both commit diffs (d3acd68 and e81907f). The fix is adequate and complete for the original blockers; no new code defects were found.
